name: Evaluation of Safety and Tolerability of Libella Gene Therapy for Alzheimer's Disease: AAV-hTERT
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov single-arm phase 1 Libella AAV-hTERT registry in Alzheimer disease, listed with unknown overall status, last-known recruiting status, estimated enrollment of 5, and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
